summary: Full frontend testing of Kawaii Sticker Trader MVP. All 15 feature tests passed. Home screen, trade mechanics, stickerdex, skins tab, and navigation all working correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in console - use boxShadow instead. Non-blocking.
Minor: props.pointerEvents deprecated warning - use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: Replace SHADOWS style using shadow* props with boxShadow to fix deprecation warnings
Optional: Replace props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents in components
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is high. All components use proper React Native patterns.
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing.
Zustand store correctly persists key state via AsyncStorage.
tradeEngine.ts computeWillingness correctly implements all documented mechanics (family bonus, single-card penalty, clamping).
Safety net in acceptTrade ensures player always has 3+ stickers - good defensive coding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP fully working. Home screen -> Trade screen navigation works. Trade mechanics (willingness meter 0->100%, accept/reject, multi-sticker bundling) all verified. Stickerdex grid with 24 stickers and family filter chips work. Skins tab shows 5 skins with Pink Paw unlocked/equipped by default. Tab navigation between Trade/Stickerdex/Skins works. Only minor deprecation warnings in console (non-blocking).
